label: Blogs
summary: My habit of sharing learnings developed at HSBC where I gave a lot of knowledge transfer sessions. This very habit nurtured my interest in writing technical blogs. Below are the technical blogs that I published with the same intention.

blogData.title: 01 Associate Android Developer Certification By Google
blogData.label: [Medium]
blogData.info: I explained the process of cracking the Google Android certification exam, interview and the approach for its preparation. I also created resources for the same purpose.

blogData.title: 02 Docker Overview with React Application
blogData.label: [Medium]
blogData.info: I touched upon the basics of Docker and its advantages. As an add on, I have also explained the process to dockerize a basic React application.

blogData.title: 03 Crypto Currency Block Chain Application
blogData.label: [Medium]
blogData.info: I wrote about the workings of blockchain technology. I also explained how your own cryptocurrency can be created by using a Redis publish-subscribe model for peers.
